character.bio: A demon of combat that has welcomed the Satsui no Hado into his being in his quest to become the ultimate master of the fist.

akuma_standing_medium_punch_m.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

akuma_standing_medium_kick_m.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position

akuma_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position1 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

akuma_crouching_medium_punch_m.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

akuma_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

akuma_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

akuma_jumping_heavy_punch.note: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

akuma_skull_splitter_m.note: *Second attack becomes an overhead only if the first attack whiffs

akuma_resso_snap_kick_m.note: 4 frames of recovery added when the attack misses3 frame of recovery added when blocked

akuma_l_gou_hadoken_lv1_l.note: Hold and release the button for 25 frames or more to activate Level 2Hold and release the button for 49 frames or more to activate Level 3

akuma_l_gou_hadoken_lv3.note: Recovery reduced by 5 frames if the attack hits or is blocked on the 76th frame or earlier

akuma_m_gou_hadoken_lv1_m.note: Hold and release the button for 25 frames or more to activate Level 2Hold and release the button for 49 frames or more to activate Level 3

akuma_m_gou_hadoken_lv3.note: Recovery reduced by 5 frames if the attack hits or is blocked on the 76th frame or earlier

akuma_h_gou_hadoken_lv1_h.note: Hold and release the button for 25 frames or more to activate Level 2Hold and release the button for 49 frames or more to activate Level 3

akuma_h_gou_hadoken_lv3.note: Recovery reduced by 5 frames if the attack hits or is blocked on the 76th frame or earlier

akuma_od_gou_hadoken.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↘→ + P
akuma_od_gou_hadoken.note: Hold down the button for over 25 frames to change its properties

akuma_od_gou_hadoken_charged.note: Recovery reduced by 5 frames if the attack hits or is blocked on the 50th frame or earlier

akuma_l_zanku_hadoken.note: Does not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

akuma_m_zanku_hadoken.note: Does not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

akuma_h_zanku_hadoken.note: Does not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

akuma_od_zanku_hadoken.note: Does not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

akuma_l_gou_shoryuken_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14Considered airborne from frames 8 - 35

akuma_m_gou_shoryuken_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 9 - 45

akuma_h_gou_shoryuken_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 7 - 52

akuma_od_gou_shoryuken.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 8.Considered airborne from frames 8 - 53.

akuma_l_tatsumaki_zanku_kyaku_l.note: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 276 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

akuma_l_adamant_flame_1_l.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 19 - 22

akuma_m_adamant_flame_1_m.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 23 - 263 frames of recovery added when the attack missesAdds +10 frames of advantage on a Punish Counter

akuma_h_adamant_flame_1_h.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 27 - 302 frames of recovery added when the attack missesAdds +12 frames of advantage on a Punish Counter

akuma_od_adamant_flame_1.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 22 - 25Produces a crumple stun for 39 frames when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

akuma_l_demon_raid_l.note: Can go into any transition attack except for Demon Low Slash and Demon Swoop between frames 18 - 40Considered airborne after frame 7

akuma_m_demon_raid_m.note: Can go into any transition attack except for Demon Low Slash and Demon Swoop between frames 18 - 40Considered airborne after frame 7

akuma_h_demon_raid_h.note: Can go into any transition attack except for Demon Low Slash and Demon Swoop between frames 18 - 40Considered airborne after frame 7

akuma_od_demon_raid.note: Can go into any transition attack except for Demon Low Slash and Demon Swoop between frames 16 - 40Can be canceled into Tenma Gozanku between frames 16 - 40Considered airborne after frame 7

akuma_demon_guillotine.note: Recovery changes depending strength of the attack blocked

akuma_demon_blade_kick.note: Initial scaling of 20% when performed from Overdrive Demon RaidRecovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked5 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

akuma_demon_swoop.note: 5 frames added to landing recovery when jumping over the opponent

akuma_oboro_throw.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2900 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000

akuma_sa1_messatsu_gohado.note: Invincible to strikes and projectiles from frames 1 - 14Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

akuma_sa1_tenma_gozanku.input: (During a neutral or forward jump) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
akuma_sa1_tenma_gozanku.note: Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterDoes not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

akuma_sa2_empyrean_s_end.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 11.Produces a wall splat if the opponent reaches the wallMinimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

akuma_sa3_sip_of_calamity.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
akuma_sa3_sip_of_calamity.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
akuma_sa3_sip_of_calamity.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 11.Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

akuma_ca_sip_of_calamity.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
akuma_ca_sip_of_calamity.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
akuma_ca_sip_of_calamity.note: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 11.Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

akuma_ca_shun_goku_satsu.context: (Can be performed when vitality is at 25% or below)
akuma_ca_shun_goku_satsu.input: (Can be performed when vitality is at 25% or below) → + LPLPLKHP
akuma_ca_shun_goku_satsu.note: Completely invincible on frame 1Invincible to projectiles from frames 6 - 27Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

akuma_goshoha.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

akuma_shuretto.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

akuma_backward_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

akuma_drive_impact_oni_goroshi.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

akuma_drive_reversal_block.displayName: Drive Reversal (while blocking): Souha Double Palm
akuma_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
akuma_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
akuma_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

akuma_drive_reversal_wakeup.displayName: Drive Reversal (while recovering): Souha Double Palm
akuma_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

akuma_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
akuma_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
akuma_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution

akuma_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

akuma_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

akuma_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

akuma_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
akuma_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
akuma_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
